description:
Notes copied from field notebook: [singing male; yellow belly, breast, & under-tail coverts; greenish brown tail; dark olive back & wings; black on forehead; very dark olive on nape & top of head; bill & legs flesh colored; eye black; yellow around eye; black facial mustache; song similar to Carolina Wren.]
Other notes: [this bird was present through the rest of June and into July 1981, reference Andrews & Righter, 1992]
